rationale: Gov't Code §1204.007 governs maximum interest rates for certain public securities. It has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Public securities authorized by an election held before April 15, 1981, may be issued, may be sold, and may bear interest as provided by Section 1204.006
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
